topic: Deep sleep's glymphatic system — brain detoxification explained
caption: Did you know your brain has a detox system? 🧠💆‍♀️ At night, the glymphatic system kicks in, removing toxins like amyloid plaques. 💡 Here are 5 facts about deep sleep's brain detox: 1) The glymphatic system is 10x more active during deep sleep. 2) It removes 60% of amyloid plaques, linked to Alzheimer's. 3) Deep sleep duration directly affects glymphatic efficiency. 4) Sleep disorders can impair the glymphatic system. 5) Exercise and meditation can boost glymphatic function. 🏋️‍♀️🙏 Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future brain will thank you! 🙌 #glymphatics #deepsleep #brainhealth #neuroscience #sleepscience #detox #healthyliving #wellness
